hero.title: Smart Farming for Future Generations
hero.subtitle: Monitor soil conditions, control irrigation, and care for your hanjeli harvest in one smart platform built for speed, clarity, and everyday control.
hero.cardText: Biotechnology has transformed agriculture with higher yields

landing.aboutBody1: Desa Wisata Hanjeli is Indonesia's first edutourism village based on the local hanjeli grain, prioritizing preservation, education, and empowerment of the local community.
landing.aboutBody2: Visitors learn hands-on through local wisdom — planting and harvesting hanjeli, pounding it on a lisung, winnowing with a nampah tray, and processing hanjeli foods and crafts.
landing.aboutBody3: Desa Wisata Hanjeli is run mostly by former migrant workers (TKI & TKW) as a way to empower and strengthen the local community's economy.
landing.aboutQuote: We replant hanjeli to preserve the community's food heritage, and process it so it carries added economic value for the people.
landing.aboutQuoteAuthorRole: Pioneer of Hanjeli Tourism Village & Kalpataru Awardee 2023
landing.howHeading: Smart Farming Made That Deliver Real Results
landing.howSubheading: A smart farming platform that connects soil, crops, and operations to help farmers grow more efficiently and safely.
landing.innovSubheading: Integrated technology solutions connecting sensors, data, and automation to support more efficient, sustainable, and competitive Hanjeli farming.
landing.innovCard1Desc: Monitor soil pH, moisture, temperature, and NPK nutrients in real-time to ensure optimal land conditions for hanjeli crop growth.
landing.innovCard2Desc: Smart watering system directly integrated with field sensor data, saving water usage up to 55% and reducing labor workload.
landing.innovCard3Desc: Supporting hanjeli cultivation education to strengthen local food security, empower village communities, and preserve local wisdom.
landing.innovCard4Desc: Data-driven weather prediction to help farmers plan planting, harvesting, and irrigation schedules more accurately.
landing.innovCard5Desc: Early detection of pests and crop diseases using artificial intelligence for faster and more precise plant protection.
landing.innovCard6Desc: AI-powered smart recommendations for land management, planting schedules, fertilization, and optimal farming strategies based on historical data and real-time conditions.
landing.trustSubheading: Appreciation and real experiences from key figures and government officials supporting local food preservation in Hanjeli Tourism Village.
landing.testimonial1Quote: We highly appreciate that among these 50 tourism villages, there is one based on food restoration. Hanjeli was nearly extinct, but is now developed with local wisdom, involving the community, and creating business opportunities and jobs.
landing.testimonial1Name: Dr. H. Sandiaga Salahuddin Uno, B.B.A., M.B.A.
landing.testimonial1Role: Minister of Tourism and Creative Economy of the Republic of Indonesia 2020–2024
landing.testimonial2Quote: Hanjeli Tourism Village is one of the proud flagship tourism villages of West Java. With the theme of community empowerment through local food preservation education, and contributing to the wealth of UNESCO Global Geopark Ciletuh-Palabuhanratu, Hanjeli Tourism Village is able to compete with other tourism villages, locally, nationally, and internationally.
landing.testimonial2Role: Former Head of West Java Province Tourism and Culture Department
landing.testimonial3Quote: Hanjeli Tourism Village is a tourism village that combines the concept of tourism and local food empowerment.
landing.faqHeading: Key Questions From Farmers And Agricultural Educators
landing.faqSubheading: A smart farming platform that connects soil, crops, and operations to help farmers grow more efficiently and safely.
landing.faq1Q: What services does your agriculture platform provide?
landing.faq1A: We provide a unified platform for field sensor monitoring, automated irrigation control, real-time data analytics, and AI-driven recommendations to boost your farm's productivity.
landing.faq2Q: How can smart farming technology benefit farmers?
landing.faq2A: Smart farming helps save up to 40% of water, increases yield by up to 45%, lowers operational costs, and enables smarter data-driven decisions.
landing.faq3Q: How do I get started with Hanjeli?
landing.faq3A: Sign up for a free account, connect your IoT devices, and start monitoring your fields in real time. Our team is happy to assist with initial setup if needed.
landing.faq4Q: Is Hanjeli easy to use for non-technical users?
landing.faq4A: Yes. Hanjeli's interface is designed to be simple and intuitive. Farmers with no technical background can easily monitor fields and control irrigation systems.
landing.faq5Q: Can Hanjeli help reduce farming costs?
landing.faq5A: Absolutely. With automated irrigation and data-driven analytics, you can save on water, fertilizer, and labor — directly lowering your operational expenses.
landing.ctaTitle: Discover the benefits of natural farming and fresh produce
landing.footerTagline: An IoT-powered smart farming platform — user-friendly, automated, and built to support modern Indonesian farmers with real-time data.
landing.footerAddressValue: Kampung Cekdam RT 10 RW 02, Waluran Mandiri Village, Waluran District, Sukabumi, West Java 43175
landing.devAddressValue: Telekomunikasi St. No.1, Sukapura, Dayeuhkolot District, Bandung Regency, West Java 40257
landing.footerCopyright: © {{year}} Hanjeli Smart Farm. All rights reserved.
landing.metaTitle: Hanjeli Smart Farm — Intelligent Farming Platform
landing.metaDesc: Unified smart farming platform for field monitoring, automated irrigation control, and real-time data analytics.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your trust is our priority. Here we transparently explain how we protect your farm data and personal information.
privacy.intro: Hello! Welcome to Hanjeli Smart Farm. We know reading legal documents can be tedious, but your privacy is incredibly important to us. This policy is written in plain English to explain what data we store when you use our platform, why we need it, and how we protect it. Rest assured, your farm data is in safe hands.

sections.heading: Data We Collect
body: Account Data: When you join, we store your name and email so you can log in. We also securely encrypt your password. Uploading a profile picture is completely free and optional.
Farm & Sensor Data: This is the heartbeat of your smart farm. We store soil pH, moisture, temperature, and NPK readings from the IoT devices installed in your fields, so you can monitor them anytime.
System Data: To keep the app running smoothly, we occasionally log basic information like the device or browser type you use. This helps our team squash bugs and maintain system security.

sections.heading: Why Do We Need This Data?
body: To give you the best farming experience, of course! We process your field sensor data so it shows up neatly on your dashboard, complete with easy-to-understand charts and analytics.
We use it to notify you instantly (in real-time) if your field needs watering, or if the soil conditions aren't ideal for Hanjeli crops.
On an aggregate level (without carrying your identity), this data helps us learn agricultural trends and refine our AI features so harvest recommendations get more accurate over time.

sections.heading: Storage & Security Fortresses
body: All your data is locked away and stored on modern server infrastructure with extremely strict access controls. Again, your password is scrambled (hashed) in such a way that even our team cannot read it.
Every time you log in, our system uses a special token (JWT) ensuring only you have control over your session. If there's any strange activity, sessions can easily be revoked.
We work hard to build the best digital security fences. However, just like a real-world garden fence, we always recommend using a strong password for maximum security.

sections.heading: Do We Share Your Data?
body: No. We do not (and will never) sell your personal data or your farm's secrets to anyone for advertising or commercial purposes.
We only share essential data strictly with our cloud hosting partners who are responsible for keeping this app alive and online 24/7.
Exceptions only apply if we are required by law or a valid court order in Indonesia.

sections.heading: Your Control Rights
body: This is your data. You are free to view, modify, or even delete your personal data through your profile settings page at any time.
You also have full control over cookie tracking via our Cookie Settings page.
If you need help exporting or permanently deleting your entire field history, our team is always ready to assist.

sections.heading: Contact Us
body: We may refine this policy as Hanjeli's technology evolves. If there are major changes, we will definitely notify you via the dashboard.
Got questions or just want to chat about data privacy? Say hello! You can reach the STAS-RG development team via the official contact form available at the bottom of our Landing Page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Fair rules of play so we can farm with peace of mind and mutual respect.
terms.intro: We are thrilled you chose Hanjeli Smart Farm as your farming partner. Reading terms and conditions often feels heavy, so we summarized them as clearly and comfortably as possible. By starting to use our platform, you agree to follow these simple rules. If anything doesn't sit right with you, you have the right to not use the service.

sections.heading: Who Can Use This?
body: This platform is designed specifically to help farmers, field managers, and admins monitor their Hanjeli fields via smart devices (IoT).
When you create an account, we assume you have read and agreed to these rules as well as our Privacy Policy. Smart farming starts with mutual agreement!

sections.heading: Keeping Your Account Safe
body: Your account is the key to your digital garden. Please keep your password confidential and do not share it with just anyone.
Ensure the information you provide is genuine and always up-to-date. Fake or suspicious accounts may have to be disabled for everyone's safety.
If you feel an unknown person has infiltrated your account, let us know immediately so we can help secure it.

sections.heading: Farming Wisely
body: We trust you will use this platform for good purposes. Please use the service reasonably and in accordance with applicable laws.
Please don't try to hack, intentionally overload our servers, or disrupt other farmers. Let's keep this digital ecosystem as healthy as our gardens.

sections.heading: Regarding Sensor Data & Reliability
body: Our sensors work hard reading nature's conditions, but they aren't perfect weather forecasters. Our data and recommendations are support tools, not absolute truths. The final decision in the field remains in your skilled hands.
We strive to keep the app online 24/7. However, sometimes, like a tractor needing service, we might have to do routine maintenance or face signal disruptions.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
body: An abundant harvest (or the opposite) depends on many natural factors. Hanjeli cannot be held liable for crop failures or losses resulting from decisions based on data from this platform.
This app is provided 'as is', as a digital assistant that we continually try to perfect every day.

sections.heading: Got Questions?
body: These rules may be updated from time to time as new features arrive. If you continue using Hanjeli after an update, we assume you agree with the latest version.
Still got something on your mind or want to discuss? Don't hesitate! Contact our development team anytime via the contact form at the bottom of the Landing Page.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.subtitle: Help us remember your habits. You have full control over what cookies we can plant in this browser.
cookies.intro: Like fertilizer that helps plants grow better, we use 'cookies' (small text files) to help this app remember your settings and recognize how you farm. You are free to turn off any features you don't want (except the essential ones so the app doesn't crash). Choose your preferences below and save anytime.
cookies.savedToast: Awesome! We've remembered your cookie preferences.
cookies.acceptedToast: Thank you! All cookies are now active for the maximum experience.
cookies.rejectedToast: Only essential cookies are currently active.

essential.name: Essential Cookies
essential.desc: These are the core cookies absolutely necessary for Hanjeli Smart Farm to turn on. They keep you logged in and secure your session from bad actors. Cannot be turned off.

analytics.name: Performance & Analytics Cookies
analytics.desc: Helps us see the big picture anonymously: which features are liked or where the app feels slow. Used so we can polish the app to be faster.

functional.name: Functional Cookies
functional.desc: Makes the app feel 'smarter'. It remembers your language and display choices so you don't have to bother resetting them every time you log in.

marketing.name: Marketing Cookies
marketing.desc: Used to show new information or offers relevant to your needs. We turn these off by default.

about: Simply put, a cookie is a small note left in your browser so our app has a 'memory' between visits.
All the preferences you check above are only stored in this browser. If you clear your browser history/data, these settings will return to factory defaults.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.description: The mobile and tablet views are currently under development. Please access through a desktop device for the best experience.

ai.analysisSubtitle: Get smart insights, predictive forecasts, and automated recommendations to optimize your Hanjeli farm growth using artificial intelligence.
ai.analysisEmptyTitle: The AI System Is Learning Your Field
ai.analysisEmptyDesc: The AI Analysis module is being trained on Hanjeli agronomic history. This feature is coming soon to give you precise, data-driven recommendations.
ai.analysisFeature1Desc: Estimates of Hanjeli harvest time and yield based on moisture, weather, and NPK trends.
ai.analysisFeature2Desc: Anomaly analysis on sensors and weather to provide early warnings of potential pest attacks.
ai.analysisFeature3Desc: Optimal Nitrogen, Phosphorus, and Potassium (NPK) dosage suggestions tailored to the planting phase.
ai.chatbotSubtitle: Hanjeli's smart assistant, ready to answer all your questions about farming, technical issues, and the IoT system whenever you need it.
ai.chatbotEmptyTitle: The AI Assistant Is Being Configured
ai.chatbotEmptyDesc: The AI Chatbot service is in its Natural Language Processing (NLP) training phase so it can communicate naturally and relevantly about Hanjeli farming.
ai.chatbotUpcomingHeading: What will this assistant be able to do?
ai.chatbotFeature1Desc: Ask about your crop problems directly — from yellowing leaves and harvest schedules to fertilizer dosage.
ai.chatbotFeature2Desc: Step-by-step help when a sensor dies, the water pump fails to start, or the connection drops.
ai.chatbotFeature3Desc: Just type 'Create this month's temperature report' and the assistant pulls the data straight to your screen.
